title: W3 Ignite Model Test - Analytical & Logical Reasoning

questions.text: Find the missing number in the sequence: 4, 9, 16, 25, 36, ?
questions.Explanation: The sequence consists of squares of consecutive integers: 2², 3², 4², 5², 6². The next is 7² = 49.

questions.text: If 'CODER' is coded as 'DPEFS', how is 'HELLO' coded?
questions.Explanation: Each letter is shifted by +1 in the alphabet (C->D, O->P, etc.). H->I, E->F, L->M, L->M, O->P.

questions.text: A clock shows 3:15. What is the angle between the hour and the minute hand?
Pointing to a man, a woman says, 'His mother is the only daughter of my mother.' How is the woman related to the man?
questions.Explanation: The 'only daughter of my mother' is the woman herself. So, the man's mother is the woman herself.

questions.text: Find the odd one out: 13, 17, 19, 21, 23
questions.Explanation: All are prime numbers except 21 (divisible by 3 and 7).

questions.text: If 5 workers can build a wall in 12 days, how many days will it take 10 workers to build the same wall?
questions.Explanation: Inverse proportion: (5 * 12) / 10 = 6 days.

questions.text: A man walks 5km East, then turns right and walks 4km, then turns left and walks 5km. In which direction is he now from the starting point?
What is the next term in the series: B2D, E3G, H4J, ?
questions.Explanation: First letters: B(+3)->E(+3)->H(+3)->K. Numbers: 2, 3, 4, 5. Last letters: D(+3)->G(+3)->J(+3)->M.

questions.text: The sum of three consecutive even integers is 78. What is the largest integer?
If 'Red' is called 'Air', 'Air' is called 'Blue', 'Blue' is called 'Water', what is the color of the clear sky?
questions.Explanation: The sky is Blue, and in this logic, 'Blue' is called 'Water'.

questions.text: Find the missing number: 2, 5, 11, 23, 47, ?
In a class of 40 students, Rahul is 15th from the top. What is his rank from the bottom?
questions.Explanation: Rank from bottom = (Total - Rank from top) + 1. (40 - 15) + 1 = 26.

questions.text: A shopkeeper sells an item for $120 making a 20% profit. What was the cost price?
questions.Explanation: Cost Price = Selling Price / (1 + Profit%). 120 / 1.2 = 100.

questions.text: Which number replaces the question mark? 8 : 64 :: 9 : ?
questions.Explanation: The relationship is square: 8² = 64, so 9² = 81.

questions.text: Logical Reasoning: Some kings are queens. All queens are beautiful. Therefore:
questions.Explanation: Since some kings are queens and all queens are beautiful, those specific kings must be beautiful.

questions.text: If the day before yesterday was Thursday, what day will it be tomorrow?
questions.Explanation: If day before yesterday was Thursday, yesterday was Friday, today is Saturday, and tomorrow will be Sunday.

questions.text: Find the average of the first five prime numbers.
questions.Explanation: First five primes: 2, 3, 5, 7, 11. Sum = 28. Average = 28/5 = 5.6.

questions.text: Choose the word that is least like the other words in the group.
questions.Explanation: Copper, Zinc, and Silver are metals; Coal is a mineral/fossil fuel.

questions.text: A train 100m long passes a bridge 200m long at 54 km/h. How long does it take to cross?
questions.Explanation: Total distance = 100+200 = 300m. Speed = 54 * (5/18) = 15 m/s. Time = 300 / 15 = 20 seconds.

questions.text: Insert the missing operational signs: 4 ? 3 ? 2 = 14
Complete the series: 1, 4, 9, 16, 25, 36, ?
If 1st January 2023 was a Sunday, what was the day on 1st January 2024?
questions.Explanation: A non-leap year has 365 days (52 weeks + 1 day), so the day shifts by +1.

questions.text: Probability: What is the probability of getting a sum of 7 when two dice are thrown?
Look at this series: 7, 10, 8, 11, 9, 12, ... What number should come next?
questions.Explanation: Alternating pattern: +3, -2, +3, -2...

questions.text: Which of the following is a Leap Year?
questions.Explanation: Centuries must be divisible by 400 to be leap years.

questions.text: If 'A' is substituted by 1, 'B' by 2 and so on, what is the sum of the letters in 'ICE'?
A man buys a cycle for $1400 and sells it at a loss of 15%. What is the selling price?
If North-West becomes North, then what will East become?
questions.Explanation: The directions are rotated 45 degrees clockwise. East rotated 45 degrees clockwise becomes North-East.

questions.text: Find the value of x: 2x/3 + 5 = 15
Complete the analogy: Book : Publisher :: Film : ?
questions.Explanation: A publisher releases a book; a producer releases/funds a film.

questions.text: How many seconds are there in 2 hours and 20 minutes?
Find the odd one out: Square, Rectangle, Triangle, Cube
questions.Explanation: Cube is a 3D shape; the others are 2D.

questions.text: A father is 3 times as old as his son. After 15 years, he will be twice as old as his son. What is the father's current age?
SCD, TEF, UGH, ____, WKL
questions.Explanation: First letter: S, T, U, V, W. Last two: CD, EF, GH, IJ, KL.

questions.text: A cube has how many edges?
Which word does NOT belong with the others?
questions.Explanation: Tyre, Steering wheel, and Engine are parts of a Car.

questions.text: If a person is walking towards the Sun in the evening, what is their direction?
questions.Explanation: The sun sets in the West.

questions.text: What is 15% of 200 + 10% of 50?
Find the missing number in the triangle: Top=12, Left=4, Right=3. Next Triangle: Top=20, Left=5, Right=?
questions.Explanation: Left * Right = Top. 5 * 4 = 20.

questions.text: What is the square root of 0.0016?
How many times do the hands of a clock overlap in 24 hours?
questions.Explanation: They overlap 11 times every 12 hours.

questions.text: If 7 spiders make 7 webs in 7 minutes, how many minutes does it take 1 spider to make 1 web?
questions.Explanation: The rate is 1 spider per 7 minutes per web.

questions.text: A boy has some chickens and cows. If the total number of heads is 50 and the total number of legs is 140, how many chickens are there?
Find the missing term: 1, 8, 27, 64, ?
questions.Explanation: Cubes of 1, 2, 3, 4. Next is 5³ = 125.

questions.text: If a rectangle has a perimeter of 20cm and a width of 4cm, what is its length?
What is the next number: 10, 20, 40, 70, 110, ?
Which fraction is the largest?
In a certain code, '256' means 'you are good', '637' means 'we are bad'. What digit means 'are'?
questions.Explanation: The common digit in both sets is 6, and the common word is 'are'.

questions.text: If you rearrange the letters 'BARIET', you get the name of a:
questions.Explanation: The letters spell 'RABBIT', which is an animal.
